headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow 2-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense. In other action, the St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, while the Colorado Rockies defeated the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-2. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles 13-3, and the Tampa Bay Rays secured a 6-3 win over the Miami Marlins. The Orioles responded with a 7-3 victory over the Nationals.

Several players are dealing with injuries, including Brendan Donovan (Seattle Mariners) who was placed on the 10-day injured list with a left groin muscle strain. Other injured players include Jack Dreyer (Los Angeles Dodgers), Hunter Harvey (Chicago Cubs), Ty Madden (Detroit Tigers), Ryan O'Hearn (Pittsburgh Pirates), Jose Trevino (Cincinnati Reds), Tommy Nance (Toronto Blue Jays), and Jake Fraley (Tampa Bay Rays).

There were several trades and roster moves, including the Los Angeles Dodgers acquiring Eric Lauer from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash. The Athletics traded Junior Perez to the Chicago White Sox for Jackson Nove, while also trading Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for Alika Williams and Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including his 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 4-2 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela notching the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks with 2 RBI, while Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Marlins 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 3-6 victory over the Miami Marlins, with several players making notable contributions. Xavier Edwards, Otto Lopez, and Yandy Díaz were among the impact hitters for the Marlins, while Jake Fraley was the only notable player listed for the Rays.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Nationals 7-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 7-3 victory over the Washington Nationals, with multiple players contributing to the win. Gunnar Henderson, Coby Mayo, Colton Cowser, Jeremiah Jackson, James Wood, Luis García Jr., and Jacob Young all had an impact in the game.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Donovan on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners third baseman Brendan Donovan has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left groin muscle strain, effective retroactive to May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **Lauer Joins Dodgers Roster**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers acquire LHP Eric Lauer from the Toronto Blue Jays in a cash trade. The move adds depth to the Dodgers' pitching staff.
